name: Guacamole Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the avocados in half, remove the pit, and scoop out the flesh into a bowl.
2. Add grated onion, lemon juice, salt, and chili powder to the avocado flesh.
3. Mash the mixture until well combined.
4. Spread Miracle Whip evenly over the top of the mashed mixture.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours.
6. After chilling, stir in the Miracle Whip until fully incorporated.
7. Serve the guacamole dip with potato chips, crackers, or corn chips.
